https://cosmeticsbusiness.com/henkel-acq.key_insight: Henkel strengthens its position in the North American hair care market with the acquisition of Not Your Mother’s.

https://cosmeticsbusiness.com/henkel-acq.headline_summary: Henkel has announced the acquisition of hair care brand Not Your Mother’s and its parent company DeMert Brands from Main Post Partners. The deal aims to strengthen Henkel's presence in the North American beauty market, although the financial terms remain undisclosed. This move is part of Henkel's strategy to expand its consumer hair portfolio, which includes brands like Schwarzkopf and Got2Be.
